html:
Exclusive to:  

The Soaked Candle can be snagged from Flotsam by using a Fishing Rod. It can be given to the Pig King for seven Gold Nuggets. When given a Soaked Candle, Wolly will drop seven Gold Nuggets and a Crimson Feather, tell a part of Wolly's Riddle, then fly away.

×7

Wine Bottle Candle

Exclusive to:  

The Wine Bottle Candle can be obtained by fishing from Watery Graves. It looks completely identical to the Soaked Candle trinket.

×4

×5

×3

Gallery

  • Soaked Candle card from Wolly's Riddle.
plainText:
Soaked Candle
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
:
Miscellaneous
"sunken_boat_trinket_3"
Exclusive to:
“Looks kinda soggy.”
–Wilson
“It wants to meet my lighter.”
–Willow
“It is the perfect amount of dampness.”
–Wolfgang
“It's completely drenched.”
–Wendy
“THIS VESSEL IS ODDLY SUITED TO FACILITATING ILLUMINATION”
–WX-78
“Appears well used.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can't imagine this having a use.”
–Woodie
“It has no apparent function.”
–Maxwell
“Was this candle burnt here, or somewhere else?”
–Wagstaff
“Söggy candle.”
–Wigfrid
“We probably can't light that.”
–Webber
“A wet candle in a bottle. Mega-genius!”
–Walani
“Not much of a candle then, is it?”
–Warly
“Candles and water don't mix.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS ENCAS'D IN HARD SNOUT GOOP”
–Wilba
“Hmm...”
–Wormwood
“I guess it's treasure?”
–Wheeler
The Soaked Candle can be snagged from Flotsam by using a Fishing Rod. It can be given to the Pig King for seven Gold Nuggets. When given a Soaked Candle, Wolly will drop seven Gold Nuggets and a Crimson Feather, tell a part of Wolly's Riddle, then fly away.
×7

–Wolfgang
“Very DIY.”
–Wendy
“THIS VESSEL IS ODDLY SUITED TO FACILITATING ILLUMINATION”
–WX-78
“Appears well used.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not very useful looking.”
–Woodie
“Looks like something one would find at a backwater flea market.”
–Maxwell
“Was this candle burnt here, or somewhere else?”
–Wagstaff
“Söggy candle.”
–Wigfrid
“What was in the bottle?”
–Webber
“A candle in a bottle. Genius.”
–Walani
“Perfect for a candlelit dinner!”
–Warly
“Where be th'wine?”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS ENCAS'D IN HARD SNOUT GOOP”
–Wilba
“Hmm...”
–Wormwood
“I guess it's treasure?”
–Wheeler

The '''Soaked Candle''' can be snagged from [[Flotsam]] by using a [[Fishing Rod]]. It can be given to the [[Pig King]] for seven [[Gold Nugget]]s. When given a Soaked Candle, [[Sunken Boat|Wolly]] will drop seven Gold Nuggets and a [[Feather|Crimson Feather]], tell a part of [[Wolly's Riddle]], then fly away.

{{Recipe
|item = Soaked Candle
|gold = yes
|result = Gold Nugget
|resultcount = 7
}}
{{clear}}

The '''Wine Bottle Candle''' can be obtained by fishing from [[Watery Grave]]s. It looks completely identical to the [[Trinkets#Soaked Candle|Soaked Candle]] trinket.

}}

}}
